children.name: hwVstmCurMacNum
children.description: This object indicates the current number MAC routes on the device .

children.name: hwVlinkImportMaxNumber
children.description: This object indicates the upper limit value of import vlink route number.

children.name: hwChnlFlag
children.description: The breakdown channel.

children.name: hwTnlDestination
children.description: The destination of the tunnel group.

children.name: hwNhmRestrainNextHop
children.description: This object indicates the iteration next hop.

children.name: hwNhmRestrainKey
children.description: The value of this object identifies the key of cyclic iteration that is suppressed.

children.name: hwNhmCyclicIterateRestrainProtocolType
children.description: The value of this object identifies the protocol type of cyclic iteration that is suppressed.

children.name: hwNhmCyclicIterateRestrainNextHop
children.description: This object indicates the iteration next hop.

children.name: hwNhmCyclicIterateRestrainType
children.description: The value of this object identifies the type of cyclic iteration that is suppressed.

children.name: hwFibStatisticsTable
children.description: Table that contains fib statistics information.

children.name: hwIpv6PrefixLimitVpnName
children.description: The name of the IPv6 VPN instance for prefix limit.

children.name: hwIpv6PrefixUpperLimitValue
children.description: This object indicates the  upper threshold of IPv6 prefixes that are supported.

children.name: hwIpv6PrefixLimitValue
children.description: This object indicates the maximum number of IPv6 prefixes that are supported.

children.name: hwIpv6PrefixLowerLimitValue
children.description: This object indicates the  lower threshold of IPv6 prefixes that are supported.

children.name: hwEvpnMacLowerLimitValue
children.description: This object indicates the lower limit value of MAC addresses of the EVPN instance.

children.name: hwCurMacNum
children.description: This object indicates the current number of MAC addresses of the EVPN instance.

children.name: hwEvpnMacUpperLimitValue
children.description: This object indicates the upper limit value of MAC addresses of the EVPN instance.

children.name: hwMacLimitEvpnName
children.description: The name of the EVPN instance for MAC limit.

children.name: hwEvpnMacLimitValue
children.description: This object indicates the max value of MAC addresses of the EVPN instance.

children.name: hwIpv4PrefixLimitValue
children.description: This object indicates the maximum number of IPv4 prefix can be added.

children.name: hwIpv4PrefixUpperLimitValue
children.description: This object indicates the upper threshold of IPv4 prefixes can be added.

children.name: hwIpv4PrefixLowerLimitValue
children.description: This object indicates the lower threshold of IPv4 prefixes can be added.

children.name: hwCurIpv6RouteNum
children.description: This object indicates the current number of IPv6 route.

children.name: hwIpv6RouteLimitValue
children.description: The value of this object identifies the number of public-network IPv6 routes that are supported.

children.name: hwIpv6RouteLimitVpnName
children.description: The name of the IPv6 VPN instance for route limit.

children.name: hwIpv6RouteStatTable
children.description:
This entity is an IPv6 route statistics table.
				Supports the statistics of DIRECT/STATIC/BGP/OSPFv3/ISIS/RIPng routes.

children.name: hwRouteStatTable
children.description: This table shows the information, such as the syntax, description, access, and status, about various objects of hwIpv6RouteStatTable.

children.name: hwIpv4PrefixNum
children.description: Total number of IPv4 prefix.

children.name: hwIpv6StaticRouteTable
children.description:
This entity is an IPv6 static route table.
				Supports the create/destroy/modify/display operation on Ipv6 static routes and BFD session binding/unbinding with static routes.

children.name: hwStaticRouteExtTable
children.description:
This entity is a static route table.
				Supports the create/destroy/modify/display operation on static routes and BFD session binding/unbinding with static routes.

children.name: hwStaticRouteExtEntry
children.description:
This entity is a static route table.
				Supports the create/destroy/modify/display operation on static routes and BFD session binding/unbinding with static routes.

children.name: hwStaticRoutePreferExt
children.description: The preference of static route.

children.name: hwStaticRouteDestVpnNameExt
children.description: The name of the destination VPN for gateway address.

children.name: hwStaticRoutePermanentExt
children.description:
Specifies the permanent-Advertising attribute of the static route:
				Options:
				1. none(0)          -indicates that the permanent-Advertising attribute is not specified  
				2. permanent(1)     -indicates that the permanent-Advertising attribute is specified
